title: lomatium marginatum var. marginatum
intro: Lomatium marginatum var. marginatum, also known as Gray's lomatium or meadow lomatium, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as the common cold and flu, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lomatium marginatum var. marginatum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and capsules, often used as an alternative or complementary treatment for respiratory health issues.
